positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for seasons_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,axiom,
    favorite_season(emma,sK0)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    ~favorite_season(mia,summer)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    summer != winter).

cnf(u61,axiom,
    favorite_season(james,summer)).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    ~favorite_season(james,X0) | sK2 = X0).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    favorite_season(james,sK2)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    summer != fall).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    spring != fall).

cnf(u54,axiom,
    summer = sK2).

cnf(u36,negated_conjecture,
    ~favorite_season(mia,spring)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    favorite_season(emma,summer)).

cnf(u41,axiom,
    ~favorite_season(mia,X0) | sK1 = X0).

cnf(u38,axiom,
    ~favorite_season(X0,X1) | summer = X1 | ~wants_long_vacation(X0)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    wants_long_vacation(james)).

cnf(u64,axiom,
    ~favorite_season(james,X0) | summer = X0).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    ~favorite_season(X0,X2) | ~favorite_season(X0,X1) | X1 = X2).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    spring != winter).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    fall != winter).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    favorite_season(mia,sK1)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    spring != summer).

cnf(u44,axiom,
    summer = sK0).

cnf(u37,axiom,
    ~wants_long_vacation(mia)).

cnf(u39,axiom,
    ~favorite_season(emma,X0) | summer = X0).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    favorite_season(X0,summer) | ~wants_long_vacation(X0)).

cnf(u40,axiom,
    ~favorite_season(emma,X0) | sK0 = X0).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
